case_title: TIMOTHY ROBERT DOYLE VS. LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-16-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-16-2008 . ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS RETAINED. BY COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK: FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-16-2008 - JUDGMENT.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOYLE, TIMOTHY ROBERT ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAR-11-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DOYLE, TIMOTHY ROBERT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LUTHERAN SOCIAL SERVICES OF NORTHERN CALIFORNIA THE EVIDENCE AND TESTIMONY DID NOT ESTABLISH ANY BREACH OF DUTY BY DEFENDANT.
